repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.ansible: idempotent tasks declaring state not commands, role and inventory structure, handlers and notify, ansible-vault for secrets, check mode with diff, fact gathering, error handling with failed_when and changed_when, tags
write a unit test for a JSON parser

retrieval_query: ansible playbook idempotent task module role inventory handlers notify vault check mode diff gather_facts failed_when changed_when tags converge

validation_smoke.name: platform.ansible L3 validation smoke
signals: second run reports zero changed tasks
check mode --diff shows the intended changes only
handlers fire only when their task reports changed
secrets stay encrypted in ansible-vault not plaintext

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.ansible diagnosis smoke
signals: a task reports changed on every run breaking idempotency
handler never fires because no task notifies it
shell/command task used where a module exists
secret committed in plaintext instead of vault
play fails mid-run leaving hosts partially converged
